queries.question: What grade did John receive on their submission and what was the topic of that conference?
queries.sql: SELECT a.submissionTopic, b.grade FROM Theme_Tracks a JOIN Submissions b ON a.themeTrackID = b.themeTrackId JOIN Students c ON b.studentId = c.id where c.FirstName = 'John'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?submissiontopic ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?c a :Students .
  ?b p:hasStudents ?c .
  ?a p:submissionTopic ?submissiontopic .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
  ?c p:firstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = STR("John"))
}

queries.question: What grade did John receive on their submission and what was the theme track and topic of that conference?
queries.sql: SELECT a.themeTrack, submissionTopic, b.grade FROM Theme_Tracks a JOIN Submissions b ON a.themeTrackID = b.themeTrackId JOIN Students c ON b.studentId = c.id where c.FirstName = 'John'

queries.question: List the grades achieved for each project by conference alongside the conference theme track.
queries.sql: SELECT a.conference, a.themeTrack, b.grade FROM Theme_Tracks a JOIN Submissions b ON a.themeTrackID = b.themeTrackId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?conference ?themetrack ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?a p:conference ?conference .
  ?a p:themeTrack ?themetrack .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
}

queries.question: For every project grade show the associated conference with the relevant theme track and submission topic.
queries.sql: SELECT a.conference, a.themeTrack, submissionTopic, b.grade FROM Theme_Tracks a JOIN Submissions b ON a.themeTrackID = b.themeTrackId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?conference ?themetrack ?submissiontopic ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?a p:conference ?conference .
  ?a p:themeTrack ?themetrack .
  ?a p:submissionTopic ?submissiontopic .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
}

queries.sparql:

SELECT ?conference ?submissiontopic ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?a p:conference ?conference .
  ?a p:submissionTopic ?submissiontopic .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?submissiontopic ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?c a :Students .
  ?b p:hasStudents ?c .
  ?a p:submissionTopic ?submissiontopic .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
  ?c p:firstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = STR("John"))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?themetrack ?submissiontopic ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?c a :Students .
  ?b p:hasStudents ?c .
  ?a p:themeTrack ?themetrack .
  ?a p:submissionTopic ?submissiontopic .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
  ?c p:firstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = STR("John"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?themetrack ?grade WHERE {
  ?a a :Theme_Tracks .
  ?b a :Submissions .
  ?b p:hasTheme_Tracks ?a .
  ?c a :Students .
  ?b p:hasStudents ?c .
  ?a p:themeTrack ?themetrack .
  ?b p:grade ?grade .
  ?c p:firstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = STR("John"))
} }
}
